title: Replace RefreshDataflow activities with TridentNotebook activities in the orchestrator pipeline (EPI/WGI automation)
description: The EPI and WGI ingestion notebooks were built under task-005, but the orchestrator pipeline was never repointed from the legacy RefreshDataflow activities to TridentNotebook activities calling those notebooks. Until this lands, external-data ingestion is not actually automated end-to-end. Originally tracked as inline subtask task-005-3 inside task-005, which was marked Finished while this item was still Pending — promoted to a standalone task by /health-check 2026-07-19 so it is visible to routing.
acceptanceCriteria: Orchestrator pipeline invokes the EPI and WGI ingestion notebooks via TridentNotebook activities.
No RefreshDataflow activities remain for EPI/WGI ingestion in the pipeline JSON.
Pipeline JSON is synced back to the repo (/sync-from-fabric) so local and Fabric agree.
notes: PROMOTED by /health-check 2026-07-19 from task-005's legacy inline subtask array (id was task-005-3). task-005 remains Finished — the EPI and WGI ingestion notebooks were built and verified; this was the human-owned Fabric-UI tail.

STALENESS CHECK FIRST — this item was authored against a pipeline that has since been reworked by tasks 022/024/026. Before doing the work, open the current pipeline-content.json and verify the RefreshDataflow activities literally still exist and that the EPI/WGI notebooks are literally still unwired. If the topology has already moved on, close this as a no-op with a note rather than forcing the original plan onto it.

COORDINATE with task-022 and task-026 — all three touch orchestrator_pipeline_bronze_to_gold.DataPipeline/pipeline-content.json. Sequence this after their Fabric application to avoid clobbering their activity changes.

FR-025 ASSIGNED 2026-07-23: this task must also update the bronze_WGI data-quality contract. data_quality_checks.Notebook asserts schema {'Country Name','Country Code','Series Name','Percentile Rank 2023'} with required fields ['Country Name','Country Code','Series Name'] — the retired Excel dataflow's shape. bronze-to-silver now HARD-REQUIRES ['Indicator Code','Year','Value'] (task-031), so the two contradict. Today bronze-to-silver fails first and the DQ activity never runs; once this task repoints bronze_WGI at bronze_ingest_wgi, the DQ schema check will start logging an advisory fail (it is not in BLOCKING_CHECKS, so it cannot halt the pipeline, but it will be noise). Update the expected schema to the API long format in the same change that rewires the activity.

NOTE 2026-07-23: until this lands, silver_wgi stays the retired 3-column shape. silver-to-gold2 previously hard-failed on that (task-031's sw.value reference); a migration guard now lets gold COMPLETE pre-task-035, but WGI coverage stays presence-only (likely 0, since the old Excel WGI carries <6 indicators) until this task repoints bronze_WGI at bronze_ingest_wgi and bronze-to-silver re-runs to produce the valued long-format silver_wgi. After task-035: re-run bronze-to-silver then silver-to-gold2 for value-filtered WGI coverage.
